---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
##library(readxl)
##library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size55[.center[
Gellman, Barton. (2021, Dec 6). Trump’s Next Coup Has Already Begun. *The Atlantic*.
]]

<br>

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/14_2-Jan6th_Riot.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: top
class: bottom, center

.size35[.content-box-red[**Political Violence by Non-State Actors in the US**]]

???

This is a huge article in terms of importance and length. :) 

### Where do you want to start?

<br>

### Key arguments?

### Is the evidence high quality?

### Are the predictions persuasive?



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.center[.size50[**Final Paper Prompt**]]

.size35[Write a report analyzing how effectively a single country has worked to reduce non-state actor terrorism within its borders. 

Be sure to supplement your argument with an analysis of the data produced by the GTD and EDTG research projects. 
- Does the data indicate that these interventions have reduced the frequency or scale of attacks?
]

???

### Any questions on the assignment?



---

class: middle, slideblue

.size70[**For Monday**]

.size50[
Bring to class a recent example of an individual, group, state or group of states taking a specific action to stop or reduce the threat of terrorism. 

Be ready to explain what happened, the strategy being employed and some idea of how effective it appears to have been.
]
